main.description: A reproducible, shareable edit: the engine-native edit graph (module DAG / history stack) that produced a derivative. graph is an opaque, versioned bundle owned by the editing engine; schemaVersion lets a reader migrate it. Complements process.editSession, which records the human-facing event.

schemaVersion.description: Identity/version of the edit-graph schema, for migration.

subject.description: The photo or artifact this recipe renders.

baseArtifact.description: Input artifact the recipe starts from.
